story.title: Dominican cacao, made by hand
story.body: We are a Dominican company dedicated to crafting authentic cacao-derived products, a healthy alternative that honors the work of rural women in Altamira, Puerto Plata. Every product comes from an artisanal process that respects the land and tradition.

products.title: Our Catalog
products.subtitle: Artisanal products made from Dominican cacao.
products.empty: We'll be adding products to this category soon.
products.vinosSlogan: A sip that connects tradition, flavor, and nature.

categoryDescriptions.chocolate: Bean to bar, handcrafted in Altamira. Every bar tells the story of Dominican cacao.
categoryDescriptions.cacao: From the earth directly to your hands. The purest essence of cacao, nothing added.
categoryDescriptions.snacks: Selected cacao beans, artisanally coated. A snack that respects the cacao.
categoryDescriptions.cuidado-personal: Made with our own cacao butter. Natural cosmetics born from Dominican cacao.
categoryDescriptions.apoyo-comunitario: Products sold by Chocolala to support other women's entrepreneurial groups in the community.
categoryDescriptions.vinos: Made with fresh fruits from our own community. Young wines, no added alcohol.

featured.title: Featured Products
featured.empty: We're preparing our catalog. Check back soon!

tours.title: Our Tours
tours.inquiryMessage: Hi, I'd like to book the tour: {tour}
tours.empty: We're preparing the details for our tours.

mapCta.title: Visit us in Altamira
mapCta.body: Come visit our artisanal factory in Las Lajas Altamira, Puerto Plata.

history.title: Our story
history.body: Fábrica de Chocolate Artesanal Chocolala is a Dominican company dedicated to crafting authentic cacao-derived products, a healthy alternative that honors the work of rural women in Las Lajas Altamira, Puerto Plata.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: To craft authentic cacao-derived products as a healthy alternative, honoring the work of Dominican rural women.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: To be an innovative company with national and international reach, socially responsible to its people and its environment.

values.name: Honesty
values.phrase: What goes into our chocolate goes into our word.

values.name: Commitment
values.phrase: Every bar is a promise kept.

values.name: Solidarity
values.phrase: We grow together or not at all.

values.name: Empathy
values.phrase: We make chocolate with the recipient in mind.

values.name: Integrity
values.phrase: No shortcuts — not in the recipe, not in business.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Real people from Las Lajas Altamira who make every product possible.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: We're in Altamira, Puerto Plata — and on your WhatsApp.
contact.phoneBody: Call us or send a message directly.
contact.socialBody: Follow us and stay up to date.
contact.addressBody: Las Lajas Altamira, main road palmar grande, Altamira, Puerto Plata.

footer.address: Las Lajas Altamira, main road palmar grande, Altamira, Puerto Plata
